title: Enchantment Modifiers
description: Make enchantments look like Tinkers' Modifiers
body:
# Enchantment Modifiers #### Requires [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn), [OptiFine](https://www.optifine.net/home) or [Chime](https://modrinth.com/mod/chime) to function
(The [Chime version is separate](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchantment-modifiers/version/ZHxrz2mT) and, currently, incomplete) Adds textures for enchantments, which are inspired by the [Tinkers' Construct](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-construct) mod's modifiers
Displays the enchantment textures for all supported enchantments on a single tool Originally made to differentiate Silk Touch & Fortune from each other quickly.
(Which is now the [FLSO](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchantment-modifiers/version/p3P67PJg) version) ![Image](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/SuJ8zxjT/images/5ffa7e8483c634edef69465e3aefca277a5d4d7a.png) ![Image](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/SuJ8zxjT/images/40c893c05f4b2b2ed4c276ef0aeb4a3480eb443a.png) ![Image](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/SuJ8zxjT/images/f62875f9df98e05f75a360c7cf4373160eb9c026.png) ![Image](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/SuJ8zxjT/images/a701527d3a258dc095d7f39210831538c51d6cad.png)
